name: Donetsk Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the sky over the Donbas steppe and the Sea of Azov
the sun, wheat and (in the lower half) the riches of the steppe
the coal of the Donbas — the region's principal mineral wealth

description: A horizontally divided flag — light blue above black — with a rising golden sun emitting rays from the hoist of the upper half.
history: Designed by Nina Shcherbak and adopted on 17 August 1999. The colours encode the Donbas's signature pairing: the sky and the coal seams beneath the steppe.

features.symbolism: the sky of the steppe over the coal of the Donbas
the rising sun over the Donbas
